item.title: American Hotel & Lodging Association (AHLA): Nimble AMS Success Story
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Because AHLA’s data wasn’t logged into one powerful platform, there was a decrease in staff productivity, an increase in manual staff work, and inconsistent reporting processes.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: The best way to promote innovation is to pick the right partner. Nimble AMS has done that for us. The platform keeps getting better and better.” Michael Blake, Chief Technology Officer, American Hotel & Lodging Association
We are very fortunate to have Nimble AMS. We continue to grow our offerings in Nimble Communities and reach higher levels of member engagement.
Chief Technology Officer at American Hotel & Lodging Association

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:13:"box-bxs-group";s:13:"feature_title";s:21:"Nimble Communities ";}s:6:"item-1";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:14:"box-bx-command";s:13:"feature_title";s:26:"Artificial Intelligence ";}s:6:"item-2";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:14:"box-bxs-report";s:13:"feature_title";s:41:"Real-time reports and dynamic dashboards ";}}

The American Hotel & Lodging Association (AHLA) represents every segment of the hotel industry and serves 32,000 members worldwide. Because AHLA represents members of the hospitality industry, the organization needs to fully understand members' activities to offer the latest resources and support. 

AHLA staff struggled to maintain data quality and consistency in its reporting. Because the organization’s data wasn’t consolidated into a single, robust platform, staff productivity decreased, manual work increased, and reporting processes became inconsistent. 

 

The organization needed an intuitive solution with built-in reporting to more easily understand its member activity. By leveraging Nimble AMS, AHLA could streamline ad hoc reporting, analyze member behavior, increase member engagement, and more.

With AHLA’s previous system, it was challenging for staff to locate member data. The old system couldn’t track or log activity, leading employees to spend too much time analyzing member data. AHLA staff had to manually build reports with no clear source of truth because data was divided across platforms. Because the AHLA team lacked the technological resources to leverage reporting, the organization experienced unproductive staff time. 

AHLA needed a total system solution with user-friendly reporting and a 360° view of their members. The organization chose Nimble AMS to embrace advanced member management, leverage Artificial Intelligence, and benefit from the platform’s continuous innovation. Because Nimble AMS offers advanced reporting, solutions to boost member engagement, and tools to enhance communications, AHLA could streamline its processes and reduce inconsistencies.

Since AHLA began leveraging Nimble AMS, the organization has significantly reduced redundancies, simplified processes, and improved the staff and member experience. With Nimble AMS, AHLA now has easier and more reliable access to its member data.  

The organization can simply review member activity, export as needed, and boost member engagement. Because Nimble AMS is cloud-based and continuously upgraded, AHLA routinely receives easy product upgrades, ensuring the organization is constantly innovating.

The American Hotel & Lodging Association is the only national organization dedicated to serving the interests of hoteliers on the front line, behind the scenes, and on Capitol Hill. Members are empowered with exclusive bottom-line savings, educational resources, and networking opportunities with an expansive network of top-level industry professionals.
Hotel & Lodging Association | AMS Case Study
Because AHLA represents hospitality members, the organization tracks activities to deliver the latest resources and support.
How AHLA gained insights into member activity

item.title: The American Society of Cataract and Refractive Surgery (ASCRS): Nimble AMS Success Story
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: By taking a phased approach to implementation, ASCRS did not have to endure yet another year in a subpar system.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: The American Society of Cataract and Refractive Surgery (ASCRS)
Our members and staff love the new AMS, and we have had nothing but great feedback from everyone who uses it.

We decided to phase in our implementation, and due to Momentive’s great team and dedication, our initial launch happened just about 3 months after we started. Our members and staff love the new AMS, and we have had nothing but great feedback from everyone who uses it. The team is truly dedicated to making their customers succeed and does what it takes to deliver. We have been extremely happy with our decision, and if I had to do it all over again, I would choose them with no hesitation.
Director of IT, American Society of Cataract and Refractive Surgery

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:4:"9000";s:16:"data_description";s:7:"members";}s:6:"item-1";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:1:"2";s:16:"data_description";s:13:"phase rollout";}s:6:"item-2";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:10:"360+degree";s:16:"data_description";s:53:"view of their individual and organizational customers";}}

Momentive implemented Nimble AMS, built on Salesforce.com, to replace ASCRS’s existing AMS with a phased approach. To meet their aggressive timeframe, Momentive considered Nimble AMS implementation creatively and proposed a phased approach.  By taking this approach, ASCRS did not have to endure yet another year in a subpar system.

ASCRS was experiencing the following pain points with its previous association management system (AMS): 

  • Deadline Approaching – ASCRS’s current legacy system support was ending soon, and they were under pressure to move systems quickly. 
  • Technology Partner Wanted – ASCRS was interested in finding a technology partner who could provide not only an effective software solution but also efficient, timely, and helpful customer service. 
  • Disparate Data – ASCRS had several data management systems in place, with varying degrees of integration to their existing member management system. Several more key sets of data (e.g., committees, awards) were being managed in spreadsheets or Word documents throughout the office. 
  • Seeking a Better Staff Experience – ASCRS sought to improve staff efficiency and organizational effectiveness through a more intuitive, user-friendly AMS. 

Momentive implemented Nimble AMS creatively and proposed a phased approach. Phase 1 included managing all aspects of ASCRS and ASOA membership (including self-service join and renewal), as well as complete integration with 3rd-party applications and both ASCRS and ASOA websites. This phase focused on all the critical functionality and requirements that ASCRS and ASOA needed immediately at launch. 

 

Phase 2 included elements that ASCRS and ASOA still needed but were not explicitly required at launch. This included remaining elements, such as product sales, education management, Government Relations, integration with email marketing, award program management, and Certification Management.

• One Centralized Data Source – Nimble AMS will be the primary data source, providing ASCRS & ASOA with a 360-degree view of their individual and organizational customers. ASCRS & ASOA will be able to run reports from a single source that identify their members’ total engagement with ASCRS & ASOA. 
  • Seamless Member Transactions – Nimble AMS is fully integrated with both ASCRS.org and ASOA.org websites, so that all transactions on the websites (e.g., membership joins and renewals, event registration, updating individual and company profiles) occur in real time with no staff intervention required, including credit card payments. 
  • Plays Well with Others – Nimble AMS is fully integrated with third-party tools ASCRS uses, including email marketing and event applications. 
  • Cloud-Based AMS – Remote staff have the same type of access as “in-house” staff. 
  • Reporting without IT Help – Staff can efficiently run reports and queries without intervention from IT staff and can easily export and schedule reports. 
  • User-Friendly & Intuitive – Staff can efficiently work within the system, even if they are not daily users of the AMS. The User interface is easy to navigate and consistent.

The American Society of Cataract and Refractive Surgery (ASCRS) is an international, educational society with more than 9,000 members. ASCRS has multiple entities, including the American Society of Ophthalmic Administrators (ASOA).
American Society of Cataract & Refractive Surgery: AMS Case Study
Momentive implemented Nimble AMS, built on Salesforce.com, to replace ASCRS’s existing AMS.
How ASCRS replaced legacy AMS with Nimble on Salesforce
ASCRS Gains a 360° View with Momentive AMS

This AMS is a beautiful tool, providing you with everything you need. With mobile accessibility, you can have everything you need in one click. Our membership team loves using it when they travel because they can just pull it up and search whenever they need.

The American Composites Manufacturers Association (ACMA) is the unified voice of the composites industry, providing a seat at the table for distributors, suppliers, and manufacturers of all sizes to gain knowledge, influence, and competitive advantage in the industry. To drive the composites industry supply chain forward, ACMA supports four member types and offers crucial member benefits like networking, expert advocacy, sustainability, events, certification and training, continuing education, and more. ACMA staff needed innovative association management software (AMS) that offered automation, accurate data reporting, and increased efficiencies.

Before switching to Nimble AMS, ACMA faced significant challenges with inefficient data due to fragmented systems. Because of ACMA’s old systems, manual processes limited member engagement and caused operational inefficiencies. When ACMA decided to change AMS platforms, the implementation occurred during the pandemic, adding pressure to ensure the platform met staff and member needs in a timely manner. ACMA chose Nimble AMS to centralize data management, improve accuracy and accessibility, and enhance member engagement through advanced tools and integrations. With this new AMS, ACMA felt empowered to offer personalized member experiences and improve operational efficiencies by automating tasks, ultimately freeing up resources for strategic member engagement initiatives.

ACMA now leverages robust reporting and dynamic dashboards, ensuring all staff have access to insightful visualizations of the status of ACMA organizational goals. With their AMS’s extensive accessibility to association-specific reports and dashboards, ACMA senior leadership, committee members, and board of directors can easily report on numbers, monitoring renewal revenue, organizational goals, counts, and non-renewal reasons, all at a glance with a comprehensive dashboard. Additionally, ACMA staff have experienced substantial growth in operational efficiency because of automation. Since automating key membership renewal processes, including member communications and ensuring members have all the necessary information for renewal season, ACMA has increased its membership renewal rate by 12%. By integrating Nimble AMS with Path LMS, ACMA staff have saved significant time by not having to monitor certifications and credits for members manually. This frees up ACMA staff to focus on hitting its member engagement goals. With the help of Momentive, ACMA is on track to exceed its member and staff goals, drive its mission, and succeed well into the future.

The purpose of ACMA is to help composites manufacturers prosper by supporting the industry in delivering composite technologies that make structures more durable, transportation more efficient, and consumer and industrial goods higher performing while minimizing their environmental footprint and supporting the workforce that delivers them.

ACMA chose Nimble AMS for automation, accurate reporting, and increased operational efficiency.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Our constituents don’t have to hunt for this important information, wondering if it’s accurate.

Nimble AMS reports and dashboards help us provide helpful data to our members and Montana’s legislature. Our constituents don’t have to hunt for this important information, wondering if it’s accurate. These reports have made MTSBA much more efficient.

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:14:"box-bxs-report";s:13:"feature_title";s:103:"Real-time reports and dynamic dashboards help enhance advocacy efforts, providing actionable insights. The Montana School Boards Association (MTSBA) seeks to develop the full potential of each child in every school. MTSBA members are voluntary school board leaders working to offer professional services to Montana’s public schools. With over 1,450 elected trustee members, MTSBA leads an intensive advocacy program. The association advocates for increased student achievement before the Montana Legislature and Congress. MTSBA also provides skills training for Montana school boards and resources to support the following areas: legal, policy, community engagement, strategic planning, human resources, and more. To advance its advocacy program, MTSBA relies on Nimble AMS. With their powerful reports and dashboards, MTSBA can provide real-time analytics to ensure Montana’s public school system continues to thrive.

MTSBA’s members are elected trustees, volunteering nearly 750,000 hours a year to increase student achievement. Motivated by their shared passion for serving the state of Montana, the members of MTSBA often work on complex challenges. Additionally, MTSBA elected trustees gather every two years to advance legislation, oversee the employment of 25,000 educational employees, and support Montana school children. 

MTSBA needed innovative solutions to organize its entire association. The organization didn’t have to look any further than its association management software, Nimble AMS. With the AMS’s powerful, built-in reports and dashboards, MTSBA can organize public records, identify vital insights, and advance legislation and advocacy efforts in Montana.

MTSBA has revolutionized its advocacy efforts with its new AMS. Because of the user-friendly reports and dashboards, MTSBA can leverage public state records, consolidating the data to make it accessible to both members and legislators. With easily accessible data, including but not limited to school district budgets, expenditures, and student achievement levels, MTSBA can make a measurable difference during legislative sessions and committee hearings, providing actionable insights in real-time.  

Additionally, MTSBA can create impactful call-to-action emails, providing pertinent data to encourage communities to contact their legislators and vote on upcoming bills. With the power of AMS reporting, MTSBA can positively impact each community in Montana, supporting each student and every school district. Nimble AMS makes it easy to empower MTSBA members, helping them make good policy decisions and proactively solve challenges.

The Montana School Boards Association is a private nonprofit membership organization founded over 95 years ago through the efforts and interests of volunteer elected trustees from throughout the state of Montana.
MTSBA Success: Analytics for Smarter Decisions

We’ve been able to automate hundreds of processes, which saves our staff countless hours each day.” Jake Adler, Chief Technology Officer ASSH
Nimble AMS, built on Salesforce, is the foundation for anything we can think of. We’ve been able to automate hundreds of processes, which saves our staff countless hours each day.

In 2015, the American Society for Surgery of the Hand (ASSH) turned to Momentive for a Salesforce-based AMS to support new and innovative approaches to its business challenges. Today, with Nimble AMS, ASSH is taking innovation to new heights, automating hundreds of processes across data updates, reports, and member communications. Staff members from any department can build multi-step automated workflows and approvals using the point-and-click Salesforce Process Builder. This means ASSH can focus on providing benefits to members instead of performing manual tasks.

Staff members were spending valuable time on manual processes, including data updates and communications. The organization knew that Salesforce-based Nimble AMS could help them work smarter and faster.

Using Salesforce-based workflow functionality with Nimble AMS and their membership data, ASSH now automates hundreds of processes, saving valuable staff time. For example, ASSH automated their fellowship application process, and it is now one of their biggest revenue drivers.  

The entire staff feels empowered to innovate and continually looks at ways to streamline both member-facing and internal processes. This is possible because ASSH uses Salesforce-based Nimble AMS to increase productivity and save time.

ASSH is the oldest and most prestigious medical society dedicated to the hand and upper extremity. Their mission is to advance the science and practice of hand and upper extremity surgery through education, research and advocacy on behalf of patients and practitioners.

The Society for Imaging Informatics in Medicine (SIIM) is a global leader in the field of imaging informatics. With a focus on enterprise imaging, SIIM strives to optimize the capture, management, analysis, and exchange of clinical imaging and multimedia content. The members of SIIM are diverse, including physicians, administrators, researchers, and industry vendors worldwide. 

Committed to improving healthcare quality, safety, and efficiency, SIIM offers professional development and learning opportunities for members and constituents. SIIM has a complex continuing education program that requires manual staff processes and a complicated member experience. The organization needed a new platform to streamline course management by integrating with its current learning management software (LMS), Path LMS.

To streamline course management, reduce manual processes, and improve the member experience, SIIM needed an innovative AMS to elevate its continuing education program.   

SIIM chose Nimble AMS to deliver an impactful member experience and streamline staff processes. Nimble AMS also integrates seamlessly with Path LMS, improving staff productivity and enhancing member engagement.

With Nimble AMS, SIIM has enhanced its continuing education program by reducing manual processes and improving the member experience. By integrating Nimble AMS with Path LMS, SIIM staff have created a process to automatically generate continuing education credits, greatly benefiting staff and members.   

  

SIIM staff love the Nimble AMS's easy configurability and created custom fields to organize the professional development program, detailing credit types. The Nimble AMS + Path LMS Credit Sync makes course management simple, with members automatically receiving a credit upon course completion and all details automatically appearing in Nimble AMS.

The Society for Imaging Informatics in Medicine (SIIM) is a global advisor and thought leader in imaging informatics, focusing on enterprise imaging, artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, infrastructure, and standards. item.title: The American Foundry Society (AFS): Nimble AMS Success Story
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: The American Foundry Society (AFS) was no longer on a supported association management system (AMS) platform, which posed a significant challenge, as there was no future path or help for their AMS.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: We went with platform and people. At the end of the day, you need both of those to succeed.
I feel like we went from circa 2008 technology to the leading edge of technology.

The American Foundry Society (AFS) was no longer on a supported association management system (AMS) platform, which posed a significant challenge, as there was no future path or help for their AMS.  

Committed to improving healthcare quality, safety, and efficiency, SIIM offers professional development and learning opportunities for members and constituents. SIIM has a complex continuing education program that requires manual staff processes and a complicated member experience. The organization needed a new platform to streamline course management by integrating with its current learning management software (LMS), Path LMS.

Unfortunately, the association technology industry lacked future-forward AMS options. Mike Lakas, Senior IT Director for AFS, had over 15 years of experience in the association technology space. He was looking to take AFS to the next level and had “been there, done that” with many of the AMSs on the market. He knew he wanted a cloud-based solution and had already moved other organizational tools to the cloud. 

AFS was updating many aspects of their organization, and their AMS troubles became the “elephant in the room.” Leadership recognized that changes were needed across the organization, and the AMS was a cornerstone of those changes. Mike commented, “The AMS is every piece of the organization–you can’t get that wrong.”  

Mike had prior exposure to Salesforce and began his search for a Salesforce-based AMS.  “Other vendors were structured like a private equity target, and we did not want to hitch our wagon to that. At the end of the day, I knew Nimble AMS was a relatively new product. However, it was built on a future-forward platform.” 

AFS was interested in a true partnership. Mike commented, “I’ve worked with several AMS companies. By far, Momentive staff and culture are amazing. They have a start-up atmosphere with an experienced mentality. People on the project were Grade A experts, enthusiastic, and wanted to see the project succeed. From implementation through to post-project support, I still feel like we are getting world-class service.

AFS no longer had to worry about costly upgrades or runaway projects, as they did with their old system. Momentive offers pain-free upgrades and always stays on the latest version. 

AFS wanted to empower staff and free up their IT department. Staff wanted to take control of their own data to create list views, run and create reports, as well as produce data exports without going through IT for simple information. The intuitive nature of Nimble AMS makes this possible. Mike remarked, “Staff are very excited over the ability to do point and click configurations to meet their requirements, a clear sign that Nimble AMS can evolve and grow with AFS to meet future needs.” 

AFS wanted to extend, connect and integrate the AMS data with various other systems without intensive manual work to make it happen. Nimble AMS, leveraging the Salesforce App Cloud, is an innovation machine unmatched by legacy systems in this regard. 

AFS required a system that maintained a high level of online performance for both staff users and constituents. There are redundancies at all levels of the Salesforce infrastructure, including power, internet service providers, networks, hardware, and software, ensuring 24/7 performance and security. 

AFS is a forward-thinking, innovative association, and technology is not just a tool for them. It is a strategy. AFS became a first mover and pioneer of Nimble Create, recognizing some cost savings in the process. By partnering with Momentive and leveraging Nimble Fuse, AFS was able to reduce the overall cost of their implementation and integrate with several solutions, including: 

  • High Road Solutions (eMarketing) 
  • Results Direct (Content Management) 
  • Higher Logic (Community) 
  • Learning Management System 

What is Nimble Fuse? In a nutshell, this API framework simplifies integrations, making inbound and outbound data accessible to outside vendors without requiring complicated architecture or modifying code. Because of the Salesforce platform and the power of Nimble Fuse, AFS didn’t have to spend valuable project dollars on integrating with other systems.

The American Foundry Society (AFS) is a non-profit association serving members of the metalcasting supply chain both in the United States and abroad. AFS serves more than 700 corporate members and nearly 8,000 individual members, including metalcasting suppliers and OEM facilities in over 41 countries worldwide, encompassing all metalcasting processes and materials.
American Foundry Society | AMS Case Study
AFS empowers staff to manage data, run reports, and export info independently. Take control of your data today!
How AFS empowered staff with self-service reporting
Why American Foundry Society Chose Nimble AMS

We love that the dashboards and reports that used to take days now take minutes to pull. Our management team is happy with the timely data that is shared.
Vice President, Constituent Engagement of the American Diabetes

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:6:"12000+";s:16:"data_description";s:24:"healthcare professionals";}s:6:"item-1";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:6:"565000";s:16:"data_description";s:53:"network of volunteers, their families, and caregivers";}s:6:"item-2";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:3:"250";s:16:"data_description";s:13:"staff members";}}

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:16:"box-bxs-carousel";s:13:"feature_title";s:47:"Reliable and worry-free product updates 3x/year";}s:6:"item-1";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:11:"box-bxs-box";s:13:"feature_title";s:20:"Automatic processes ";}s:6:"item-2";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:14:"box-bxs-report";s:13:"feature_title";s:40:"Real-time reports and dynamic dashboards";}}
From data inconsistencies and manual processes to staff efficiency and real-time reporting

Since 1940, the American Diabetes Association (ADA) has supported people living with diabetes, those at risk of developing diabetes, and healthcare professionals who serve at-risk individuals by providing resources to improve health outcomes and quality of life.  

To fulfill its mission, ADA used a variety of software platforms, but they weren’t integrated. This made the software challenging for both staff and members to use and required employees to manually verify data, adjust formatting, and transfer records between systems. The organization needed a total system solution that could provide a 360° view of their members and constituents—ADA turned to Momentive.

ADA’s data wasn’t integrated into one powerful association management system (AMS) and instead spread across multiple systems, resulting in incompatible records. Employees would have to export the data, send it to an external firm to clean up the formatting, and then re-enter the records into the other system. Data across multiple systems resulted in manual, time-consuming work for staff and reporting that could only be completed at the month’s end. 

 

Because ADA leveraged many software platforms, the organization struggled to maintain data quality and consistency across its reporting. Staff across levels and departments had regular, ongoing data analytics needs, but reporting was both time-consuming and incomplete.  

ADA needed a total system solution with strong integration capabilities across multiple third-party systems to unify its data and provide a 360° view of members and constituents. The organization chose Nimble AMS.

Staff were familiar with Salesforce, so the organization prioritized a powerful AMS built on Salesforce—enter Nimble AMS. After switching, ADA has significantly reduced redundancies, simplified processes, and improved the staff and member experience. With Nimble AMS, the organization has eliminated unnecessary processes, saved countless hours of manual work, and increased efficiency, allowing staff to focus more on their mission.   

Real-time reports and dashboards empower executives, association leaders, and staff at all levels to stay better informed about ADA data. Reports that used to take days to develop now take minutes and can be pulled at any time, not just at the end of the month. The organization easily keeps key ADA executives informed with the latest reports, making everyone more data-driven. Staff agree that Nimble AMS has empowered the organization to significantly improve its processes and procedures, ultimately increasing staff satisfaction.

The mission of the American Diabetes Association is to prevent and cure diabetes and to improve the lives of all people affected by diabetes. The organization leads the fight against the deadly consequences of diabetes and fights for those affected by diabetes. Formed initially as a professional association for health care providers, ADA expanded its organization to deliver services to hundreds of communities living with diabetes.
American Dental Association | AMS Case Study
Countless staff hours are saved every month by eliminating manual, disjointed processes and multiple software platforms
How ADA saved hours monthly with Nimble AMS
ADA Improves Member Experience with Unified AMS

The Association of periOperative Registered Nurses (AORN)
Now that our team knows how to leverage Nimble AMS, we’ve become much more productive and forward thinking.

With AORN’s previous system, we had always delayed initiatives because we didn’t have the resources or the platform to expand. With Nimble AMS, AORN could innovate our approach to member services, advance our mission, and take the next step with the platform.

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:0:"";s:13:"feature_title";s:19:"Nimble Communities ";}s:6:"item-1";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:0:"";s:13:"feature_title";s:41:"Real-time reports and dynamic dashboards ";}s:6:"item-2";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:0:"";s:13:"feature_title";s:48:"Reliable and worry-free product updates 3x/year ";}}

In 1949, operating room nurses created an association to advance surgical nursing as a practice. For 75 years, the Association of periOperative Registered Nurses (AORN) has championed the roles of all perioperative nurses and has worked to advance evidence-based practice, education, and collaboration.  

AORN is proud to support a membership community of 44,000 healthcare professionals in the perioperative nursing field. To ensure patient safety and optimal outcomes, AORN offers personal and professional development for its members with career resources, continuing education, and a membership community.  

To continue to offer AORN members tangible benefits and a quality experience, AORN staff felt it was time to replace its association management software (AMS) after 25 years. AORN needed an AMS that could scale to meet the needs of the association, offering flexibility and automation functionality to streamline key processes. Discover why AORN chose Momentive.

For 25 years, AORN leveraged the same association management software (AMS). The previous AMS platform lacked automation functionality and required AORN staff to do a great deal of manual work. Additionally, the previous AMS wouldn’t integrate with other systems.  

AORN staff knew they needed a modern AMS solution to support its members. The organization chose Nimble AMS, built on Salesforce, because of its innovative, scalable technology. With the AMS’s continuous automatic updates, AORN staff knew they wouldn’t have to worry about product upgrades breaking the system.

Since implementing Nimble AMS, AORN has become more forward-thinking and productive. Staff are thrilled to leverage automation functionality, saving crucial time by streamlining key processes. With less manual work, there is also less opportunity for error, improving data cleanliness and reliability.  

Staff are also excited to offer more self-service capabilities to empower members in advancing the organization’s goals. AORN has been able to improve its member experience with automatic membership renewals and the automatic delivery of flagship AORN education products. Their new AMS also makes it easy for AORN to give its organizational members additional control over their memberships and rosters. AORN has enhanced the member experience through automation.

The Association of periOperative Registered Nurses (AORN) was founded in 1949 to establish a national community for operating room nurses who sought to share best practices for patients undergoing surgery. Today, AORN empowers perioperative nurses, healthcare organizations, and industry partners to support safe surgery for all patients.
How automation improved member experience and growth

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:17:"box-bx-cloud-rain";s:13:"feature_title";s:33:"Actionable Business Intelligence ";}s:6:"item-1";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:12:"box-bx-reset";s:13:"feature_title";s:47:"Reliable and worry-free product updates 3x/year";}s:6:"item-2";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:17:"box-bxs-user-plus";s:13:"feature_title";s:43:"Member Portal to enhance member experience ";}}

Since 1856, the Missouri State Teachers Association (MSTA) has led the way for Missouri’s educators, offering services and benefits. To professionally develop its members, MSTA offers learning opportunities, webinars, online learning workshops, a book club, and more member benefits. MSTA also provides legal services and resources for its members, answering legal questions and concerns for more than 150 years. Missouri educators can find great value in MSTA membership at every stage of their career, whether they are an aspiring teacher or a retiree.  

MSTA needed powerful association management software (AMS) to meet the needs of its members while offering continual value. For over 11 years, MSTA has leveraged Nimble AMS, providing a stable and reliable user experience for both its staff and members.

With MSTA’s previous AMS platform, the organization experienced several pain points. MSTA was unable to deliver member value, and specifically had a clunky online membership join and renewal process. MSTA’s old system was inflexible and unable to address growing organizational needs.  

Version upgrades were very costly and often caused new issues. MSTA’s IT department frequently operated in a break/fix mode. Staff also found it challenging to access the data they needed within the current AMS. For this reason, staff created “rogue databases” as a workaround. MSTA worked with Momentive to streamline its processes, update its data, centralize its records, and improve its member experience.

After deciding that Momentive had the best association management software option for MSTA, the organization moved from multiple systems to Nimble AMS. Following the implementation, staff can now access all necessary information in one location, making it much easier to provide excellent member service and improve visibility through much-needed reporting. All membership data is now updated and correct, empowering staff to do their jobs more efficiently.  

Without the distraction of break/fix updates, IT staff can now contribute to MSTA more strategically, focusing on future-proofing the association and hitting organizational goals. Additionally, the MSTA member experience has improved. With a simple user experience, MSTA members feel empowered to update their profile information, join, renew, or register for an event. Because Nimble AMS has dramatically improved the MSTA staff and member experience and put the organization on track to hit its goals, MSTA continues to be a loyal Momentive partner.

The Missouri State Teachers Association serves more than 47,000 educators and is dedicated to educating the state’s children. MSTA is a grassroots organization comprised of local Community Teachers Associations (CTA) in each local school district.
How Missouri State Teachers Association modernized AMS

Since 1875, the American Bankers Association (ABA) has been a leader in innovation. ABA is a trade organization for banks of all sizes, serving over two million bank employees with the latest industry news, mission-critical training opportunities, educational resources, advocacy offerings, and online discussion groups.  

ABA is a trailblazing association, but felt stuck with its old, overcustomized association management software (AMS). It was clear that a change was necessary. After researching two Salesforce-based AMS platforms, there was a clear winner—ABA chose Nimble AMS.

ABA’s previous AMS was an outdated system, customized beyond recognition. ABA realized it was time to update AMS platforms and began searching for software, bringing in all its stakeholders across teams.  

Within the organization, ABA staff had successfully leveraged Salesforce. The organization wanted to continue using Salesforce, so it searched for AMS solutions that integrated with the platform, seeking software that helped staff prioritize members and customers, enhance communication, and increase innovation. 

ABA collaborated with a selection consultant to discover the best AMS for its staff and members. With the consultant’s help, ABA narrowed its search down to two Salesforce-based AMS solutions—but there was a clear winner. ABA chose Nimble AMS and Salesforce to reach its organizational goals and exceed member expectations.

With their new AMS, ABA is exceeding organizational goals and transforming the member experience. ABA loves how all Momentive customers are on the same version, leaving no one behind and offering the latest innovations. To empower its organization and advance its mission, ABA has reconfigured its Salesforce offerings, Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, and Marketing Cloud, fully integrating with Nimble AMS.

Founded in 1875, the American Bankers Association has always been at the heart of the innovations that help bankers serve their customers. From delivering the latest industry news to developing mission-critical training offerings, ABA supports America’s banks as they perform their vital role in energizing the economy and helping communities thrive.
How Nimble AMS drives innovation for bankers

The Electric & Gas Industries Association (EGIA) is a non-profit dedicated to providing resources that uplift the home services industry, representing over 1,350 companies and thousands of members across the United States and Canada. EGIA offers services through in-person training, webinars, online classes, and access to a library of learning content.  

Since 2021, EGIA has leveraged Nimble AMS as its association management system (AMS). Especially vital to the organization are the AMS’s member portal, member roles, reports, and dashboards. After the Pandemic and staff turnover, EGIA worked with the Momentive team to further utilize the platform, empowering the organization to achieve its goals and increase its membership. By re-investing in AMS staff training, EGIA continues to discover new ways to improve processes and productivity, ultimately delivering a superior staff and member experience.

EGIA faced the challenge of using multiple disparate systems. Since the organization wasn’t integrated into one powerful, flexible system, it struggled to do everyday tasks such as managing member accounts. EGIA needed an AMS that provided structure and ease of use in creating accounts. Staff needed everything in one place and didn’t want to worry about upgrades and maintenance. 

EGIA required a total system solution to unite its data and offer a 360° view of its members. With a total system solution, EGIA staff would feel empowered to more easily manage their members. EGIA chose Nimble AMS over another Salesforce-based AMS because of the automatic updates and Momentive’s sales and support team’s quick response time and above and beyond assistance.

After switching to Nimble AMS, EGIA has consolidated into one system, reduced redundancies, increased membership, simplified processes, and improved the staff and attendee experience. By leveraging Nimble AMS’s Community Hub, EGIA was able to streamline integral processes, empowering employees to take control of their system by making edits and accomplishing more with less. With the power of Nimble AMS, EGIA can now focus on providing more member value and enhancing the member experience

item.title: Alberta Veterinary Medical Association (ABVMA): Nimble AMS Success Story
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: As a forward-thinking organization committed to excellence in veterinary medicine, ABVMA recognized the growing need to modernize its internal systems to serve its members and the public better and uphold its regulatory responsibilities. ABVMA chose Nimble AMS to fuel its growth.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Momentive Helps ABVMA Fuel Organizational Growth and Innovation

We really felt we needed to upgrade to a new innovative platform like Nimble AMS that was constantly developing and evolving so that we had a system that would grow and innovate with us as well.
Registrar, The Alberta Veterinary Medical Association

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:14:"box-bxs-report";s:13:"feature_title";s:41:"Real-time reports and dynamic dashboards ";}s:6:"item-1";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:20:"box-bxs-check-circle";s:13:"feature_title";s:40:"Reliable and worry-free updates 3x/year ";}s:6:"item-2";a:2:{s:12:"feature_icon";s:12:"box-bxs-data";s:13:"feature_title";s:55:"Integrated system to enhance organizational efficiency ";}}

The Alberta Veterinary Medical Association (ABVMA) is the regulatory organization for the practice of veterinary medicine in Alberta, ensuring all veterinarians and veterinary technologists are qualified to practice. ABVMA oversees academic, personal, and ethical qualifications of members, ensures all members upgrade skills, inspects veterinary clinics, and processes and resolves complaints regarding the veterinary profession throughout Alberta.   

  

As a forward-thinking organization committed to excellence in veterinary medicine, ABVMA recognized the growing need to modernize its internal systems to serve its members and the public better and to uphold its regulatory responsibilities. ABVMA chose Momentive’s Nimble AMS to fuel its growth.

ABVMA’s original software solution was hindering organizational efficiency. Due to aging systems that couldn’t scale or integrate, both staff and members had a frustrating user experience, making basic processes less efficient. These disjointed software systems and manual processes also increased the duplication of staff tasks and the risk of errors.  

ABVMA knew it needed more than a technology upgrade—the organization required a modern, innovative AMS platform to evolve alongside its mission. After evaluating several solutions, ABVMA selected Nimble AMS, built on Salesforce, for its proven track record of reliability and innovation, robust database capabilities, and scalability. Another reason ABVMA chose Nimble AMS is for the six continuous software upgrades provided every year, ensuring all customers are on the latest version at all times. ABVMA also selected Nimble AMS for its robust integration capabilities, which support conference management, membership tracking, and compliance data. With Nimble AMS reporting and dashboard tools, staff can now provide actionable insights for strategic organizational planning.

Now that Nimble AMS has been implemented, ABVMA expects significant improvements across its operations. Momentive will help ABVMA by providing a scalable, adaptable platform that works for the organization, not against it. Both staff and members will have a modern, intuitive, user-friendly experience, enhancing the staff and member experience. Through automation tools, staff can reduce manual work and increase efficiency. With detailed, easy-to-pull reports, staff can make informed decisions. Members will experience enhanced self-service options through the Member Portal, empowering their membership journey.   

By choosing Nimble AMS, ABVMA has positioned itself for a future of innovation and efficiency. Partnering with Momentive enables ABVMA to serve Alberta’s veterinary professionals better and maintain its role as a leading regulatory body in the industry.

The Alberta Veterinary Medical Association (ABVMA) is the professional regulatory organization governing the practice of veterinary medicine in Alberta. The organization offers leadership in animal health and welfare and is proud to represent the oldest profession in Alberta.
ABVMA Drives Growth with Momentive AMS

item.title: American Ceramic Society (ACerS): Nimble AMS Success Story
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: A convenient online platform for member networking yields new insights into member behaviors and needs.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: American Ceramic Society | AMS Case Study

Working with the Momentive team, we surpassed all of our goals for online community participation. We feel very fortunate that we had Nimble Communities in place when the pandemic hit and members needed a way to connect virtually more than ever before.
With Nimble Communities, our members can easily connect with other members that they didn’t even know were out there. That’s the whole point of being in a professional society.

Since 2018, the American Ceramic Society (ACerS) has used Nimble AMS as its association management system. When members of a minor division of the society asked for a place to interact and share ideas online, ACerS saw the benefits of offering an online member community for the entire organization.

ACerS wanted to provide an online space for members to network, share ideas, and communicate. The team sought an alternative to the dedicated online community solutions available on the market.  

After researching leading online community solutions, the organization partnered with the Momentive team to pilot Nimble Communities, which allows customers to set up and host an online member community built on the Salesforce Community Cloud platform. This community functionality proved especially valuable during the COVID-19 pandemic, enabling ACerS members to connect virtually when in-person meetings were not possible. 

ACerS partnered with Momentive to be the first customer on Nimble Communities, a Nimble AMS-integrated solution built on the Salesforce Community Cloud Platform.

ACerS members easily connect, and staff participate in conversations to gain insights for their member programs. ACerS plans to add more content to make the community the go-to place for industry information and networking.

Since 1898, ACerS has been the hub of the global ceramics community and one of the most trusted sources of knowledge on ceramic materials & applications. If ceramics and glass technologies are a significant part of your work, then ACerS is the professional society for you.
How American Ceramic Society exceeded engagement goals

NASPA is an association that represents professionals working in the field of student affairs in higher education. The NASPA team had been using association management software (AMS) that was highly customized for their complex membership structure. In fact, the system was tailored to such an extent that it broke every time their software vendor upgraded the product. To make matters worse, the vendor offered poor customer service.  

NASPA decided they needed a new solution that:  

✓ Was built on the Salesforce platform  

✓ Could easily handle complex membership structures  

✓ Offered excellent customer service and support  

✓ Was provided by not just a technology vendor, but also a partner that helps customers reach their goals

NASPA’s old AMS solution was holding them back. It was challenging to use and often broke during product upgrades. When the organization looked to their AMS vendor for help, they were met with a poor customer experience. NASPA decided to move to an AMS system built on the Salesforce platform. 

 

The organization found what they were seeking, and more, in Nimble AMS. Nimble AMS is easier to use and allows NASPA to automate many manual processes. It is highly configurable, helping NASPA increase revenue by better aligning members with the correct membership type, while also ensuring stability during upgrades. Nimble AMS provides deeper insight into data, helping NASPA make more informed business decisions, and a client experience team that is dedicated to NASPA’s success.

Using Nimble AMS, NASPA has:  

✓ Increased dues revenue by better aligning members with the appropriate member type and sped up the dues collection process with Express Payments  

✓ Improved efficiencies by automating and simplifying processes in multiple areas, including membership renewal and membership reporting, cutting monthly membership reporting from a three-day process down to two hours  

✓ Gained greater insights into their membership data, using advanced analytics to make more informed business decisions
NASPA is a nonprofit association that represents administrative professionals and students who work in the field of student affairs in higher education.
How NASPA improved efficiency with Nimble AMS analytics

item.title: Petroleum Equipment Institute (PEI): Nimble AMS Success Story
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: After facing multiple challenges with their AMS, the PEI team turned to Nimble AMS for a cloud-based solution with built-in association functionality that is configurable, easy to use, and maintainable.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Petroleum Equipment Institute | AMS Case Study
Learn how PEI used AMS to streamline processes and grow member engagement. Read the case study for insights and measurable outcomes.

Our previous AMS felt like a dead end. It was so highly customized that there was no easy way to upgrade it. After looking at multiple cloud-based platforms, we chose Nimble AMS because it seemed much more tailored to the needs of associations.” J. Rex Brown, Director of Information Services, PEI

With Nimble AMS, we now have easier and more reliable access to our member data. We can configure the system to meet our needs. And since it’s cloud-based, with easy product upgrades, we don’t have to worry about maintaining and updating it.

PEI’s member management software was so highly customized that there was no clear path to upgrade the system. Plus, the organization’s member data was “trapped” in the system, with no straightforward or dependable way to pull the reports staff needed.

The Petroleum Equipment Institute (PEI) is a trade association that had used the same association management software (AMS) for about 10 years. Because the product was highly customized to meet their needs, the PEI team had no clear path to upgrade the software. Then, due to changes after another AMS company purchased the product, PEI found it challenging to access the data needed to serve both their company and individual members. For example, to access primary member contact information, employees had to piece together queries or use other workarounds. 

 

The solution? The team turned to Nimble AMS by Momentive Software for a cloud-based solution that provides hassle-free product upgrades, simplified access to member data, and the ability to configure the system to meet their specific needs. PEI now utilizes Nimble AMS’s out-of-the-box association functionality, tailored to meet the organization’s particular needs.  

 

Employees across the association – even non-technical staff – can easily pull and configure reports from the system and create quick-reference dashboards for the executive team.

With Nimble AMS, the PEI team has the functionality they need in a system that’s easier to use and maintain. Even PEI’s non-technical staff can pull and modify reports that show the data they need. Staff can now perform tasks they were previously unable to do, such as converting paper-based forms to online formats.

The Petroleum Equipment Institute is a trade association whose members manufacture, distribute, and service petroleum marketing and liquid handling equipment. Founded in 1951, PEI represents more than 1,600 member companies in all 50 states and more than 80 countries. Members include manufacturers, sellers, and installers of equipment used in service stations, terminals, bulk plants, fuel, oil, and gasoline delivery, as well as similar petroleum marketing operations.
Why PEI chose Nimble AMS for association needs
PEI Simplifies Operations with Nimble AMS

item.title: Massachusetts Dental Society (MDS): Nimble AMS Success Story

The Momentive team helps us think through ways to streamline our processes and provide a better experience for our members and sponsors. The online storefront for our Yankee Dental Congress event, for example, allows companies that target dental professionals, such as 3M and Colgate, to purchase booth space and sponsorships in a way that’s more convenient for them and easier for us to manage.” Nicole Bowen, Digital Solutions Architect, MDS

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:2:"5k";s:16:"data_description";s:7:"Members";}s:6:"item-1";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:3:"80%";s:16:"data_description";s:28:"of dentists in Massachusetts";}s:6:"item-2";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:3:"25%";s:16:"data_description";s:57:"Increased sales through the annual event’s online store";}}

Like many associations, MDS had customized their association management software (AMS) to such an extent that it would break during product upgrades. The AMS became difficult to use and too costly to maintain.  

In 2014, MDS transitioned to Nimble AMS, a system that offers an intuitive and configurable interface with continuous upgrades and support, all at no additional maintenance costs.

MDS was tired of spending time and money on an AMS that broke during product upgrades, was difficult to use, and cost too much to maintain. The organization needed a more cost-effective AMS system, built on the Salesforce platform, that was easier to use and consistently included the latest technology – without incurring additional costs or requiring customizations that were outdated or broken. 

 

After transitioning to the new AMS system, MDS found they were able to find new ways to improve processes and deliver a better member experience through digital transformation.

After implementing Nimble AMS, MDS was able to move beyond their initial list of requirements. They found new ways to increase their return on investment (ROI) and enhance the member and sponsor experience through the digital transformation of processes, which are now tracked and enabled with Nimble AMS, such as:  

  • Branded online member portal:  
  • Member profile – personal snapshot of account summary, login management, individual order history, and resource center (a members-only store built on Salesforce Community Builder)  
  • Online learning with LMS  
  • Dues automation – online transaction for processing new members and dues renewals, including annual and payment plan options  
  • Member donation process  
  • Event registration using Momentive Event Management  
  • Data exchange with Salesforce Marketing Cloud  
  • Online store for companies to purchase exhibit booths, sponsorships, and supplies for MDS’s Yankee Dental Congress, one of the top three dental meetings in the U.S, which attracts about 28,000 attendees each year from around the world    

MDS got an AMS that met their requirements, and much more. Working with the Nimble AMS team, MDS also:  

  • Enhances their ROI, including increased sales through their Yankee Dental Congress store  
  • Increases member value by moving multiple offerings and processes online  
  • Saves staff time by streamlining and automating internal processes  
  • Continues to find new ways to use Nimble AMS to improve the management of their organization

A 5,000-member constituent of the American Dental Association, MDS is dedicated to the professional development of its member dentists through initiatives in education, advocacy, and promotion of the highest professional standards, and championing oral health in the Commonwealth.
How MDS improved ROI through digital transformation
Higher ROI Through Digital Transformation with AMS

item.title: The United States Institute for Theatre Technology, Inc. (USITT): Nimble AMS Success Story
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: When USITT was ready to change association management software (AMS) to meet their evolving needs, they wanted an AMS built on the Salesforce CRM platform. They turned to Nimble AMS by Momentive.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: USITT upgraded to Nimble AMS on Salesforce to meet evolving AMS needs. Discover how the right AMS can streamline operations, learn more today!
The United States Institute for Theatre Technology, Inc. (USITT)

We chose Nimble AMS because of Momentive’s great service and because we wanted our AMS to be on the Salesforce CRM platform. We wanted a flexible system that could evolve with us, and we didn’t want to worry about it being managed or updated.

Momentive made changing our AMS the easiest transition we’ve ever experienced because the Nimble AMS and NetForum teams worked directly together within the Momentive umbrella of companies. Our staff didn’t have to coordinate between two companies, which saved us time and hassle and avoided the danger of us making mistakes as the go-between.

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:4:"100s";s:16:"data_description";s:61:"RESOURCES FOR PERFORMING ARTS AND ENTERTAINMENT PROFESSIONALS";}s:6:"item-1";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:4:"4000";s:16:"data_description";s:7:"MEMBERS";}s:6:"item-2";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:2:"20";s:16:"data_description";s:31:"HOURS OF TIME SAVED PER PROJECT";}}

USITT moved from NetForum by Momentive to Nimble AMS by Momentive. Keeping the organization within the same family of products made the transition very efficient and seamless. Using Nimble AMS, USITT now automates many manual processes — saving staff time, reducing data entry errors, and improving the speed and accuracy of reporting. “We set up processes and reports, and we don’t have to worry about them again,” said USITT Executive Director David Grindle. “Everyone gets the information they need when they need it, and we have more time to focus on our members. Everyone stays happy.”

USITT wanted their association management software (AMS) to be built on the Salesforce platform for reliability and flexibility. They also wanted an AMS that could help them work more efficiently and accurately – even as their organization grew and evolved.  

USITT utilizes Nimble AMS as a Salesforce CRM platform-based member management solution, enabling them to automate multiple processes and support their numerous member workshops and events.

USITT saves approximately 20 hours of staff time per project, allowing staff to focus on member relationships rather than mundane tasks such as data entry and sending reports and emails. As a result, the organization sees fewer data entry errors and more accurate reports.

USITT connects performing arts design and technology communities to ensure a vibrant dialogue among practitioners, educators, and students. Founded in 1960 as an organization to promote dialogue, research, and learning among practitioners of theatre design and technology, today USITT has grown to include members at all levels of their careers and has embraced the new technologies being used in entertainment.
Why USITT chose Nimble AMS on Salesforce
USITT Transitions Seamlessly to Nimble AMS

item.title: Council on Foundations (COF): Nimble AMS Success Story
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Internal Operations Became Easy and Efficient with Nimble AMS on the Salesforce Platform.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Council on Foundations had numerous pain points with previous AMS, so they made the switch to Nimble AMS.
I’m very, very happy compared to what we came from. And I wish we had done this sooner.
I’m very, very happy compared to what we came from. We made the right decision. It is the right system for us. I have no problem recommending it to folks. And I wish we had done this sooner.
Vice President of Technology, Council on Foundations

When COF was initially using its legacy AMS, it proved to be a decent solution at the time. However, when the organization began to undergo significant changes, it was essential that their technology could evolve with them.

COF began to encounter issues with its legacy AMS, such as: 

  • Inability to access and import data without significant help from IT 
  • Inability to configure to their needs without expensive customizations 
  • Upgrades were costly and complex because customizations had to be rebuilt with each release 

Because of the pain they were experiencing, COF started to look into other solutions. They were particularly impressed with what they saw in Nimble AMS, including how their upgrades were managed, the fact that it’s 100% cloud-based, and the variety of apps available in the AppExchange. 

 

They knew that choosing a Salesforce-based AMS, like Nimble AMS, would be a significant change in direction, but one they could definitely get behind. 

 

By choosing Nimble AMS built on the Salesforce platform, they now have numerous opportunities to extend the system as Nimble AMS integrates with multiple third-party applications.

COF felt comfortable in many aspects of their relationship with Momentive. The support system was great, and Salesforce also provided help when needed. There were no responsiveness issues in terms of needing solutions to their problems, and they felt the staff was knowledgeable and invested in being helpful. Momentive is also proactive in ensuring that COF is constantly upgraded to the most up-to-date version. 

 

COF staff feel that Nimble AMS makes it very easy for them to self-support. While their organization undergoes changes and evolution, they’re able to take over administration and customization, allowing them to evolve very quickly, which is highly valuable to their entire team. 

Momentive and Nimble AMS bring an understanding of how associations work, coupled with Salesforce’s ability to be leveraged to support the initiatives of organizations (membership, event registration, committee management, or whatever the goals may be). 

In particular, COF saw significant improvement in three specific areas, including: 

  • Staff efficiency equates to cost savings: 
  • Anyone on staff can enter and update records, which is a phenomenal savings in terms of efficiency. And, they can do it on any device! 
  • COF transitioned from having a very small subset of the organization owning the system (IT, in particular) to having everyone own it. 
  • Nimble AMS is much easier for the executive team to support. In fact, they have full executive buy-in because it’s backed by the Salesforce platform. 
  • From an end-user perspective, the COF staff is writing and running their own reports, which they’ve never done before. 
  • There are much better data integrity controls in place; the chances of junk data getting into the system are significantly reduced  
  • Members are more empowered to do things like: 
  • Update their own profiles 
  • Add records to their company 
  • Manage their company’s roster 
  • Updating Data: 
  • Getting records and data into the system is so easy. They no longer need to build workarounds. 
  • The system has numerous built-in features to prevent integrity issues, making it easier for COF to bring data in and manipulate it. Previously, it had gotten to the point where they weren’t even doing that. 
  • There were times when their organization had to pay around $10,000 to bring in a large list of records; now, they can do it themselves, saving a significant amount of money. 
  • Nimble AMS integrates with most anything. 
  • The overall cost of ownership over time (annually for support, maintenance, etc.) is expected to decrease. When considering the cost of support, design and development work to add resources to support the system versus having staff use it, COF has cut their price in half.

The Council on Foundations (COF), founded in 1949, is an active philanthropic network and a nonprofit leadership association of grantmaking foundations and corporations. It provides the opportunity, leadership, and tools needed by philanthropic organizations to expand, enhance, and sustain their ability to advance the common good. The Council empowers professionals in philanthropy to meet today’s toughest challenges, and advances a culture of charitable giving in the U.S. and globally.
How Council on Foundations boosted engagement with Nimble

item.title: American Society on Aging (ASA): NetForum Success Story
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: American Society on Aging finds the perfect AMS + LMS match to reach their goals

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: American Society on Aging: AMS & LMS Solutions
American Society on Aging finds the perfect AMS + LMS match to reach their goals

Taking data out of a system that was not a true CRM and mapping it to a real CRM was difficult, but it was a beneficial process from our perspective. Momentive’s NetForum and LMS teams came together to give staff hope that our dreams could come true.

Since adopting NetForum, ASA staff can dream a little bit more. These things can really come true. Organizing our virtual learning offerings under one umbrella, segmenting them between members and non-members, and charging fees or not are all things we’ve wanted to do with our learning management system. And we will grow our membership because of LMS, NetForum, and their connection. We can do all of it now.
Chief Operating Officer & Chief of Staff, American Society on Aging

Since 1954, ASA has developed and led the largest, most diverse community of American professionals working in aging. As a result, ASA has become the go-to source for cultivating leadership, advancing knowledge, and strengthening the skills of its members and others who work with and on behalf of older adults. ASA sees its responsibility as a leader in advocating for the necessary changes to address aging-related issues.  

ASA was disappointed and frustrated that its previous software systems— association management software (AMS) and learning management software (LMS) didn’t integrate, describing the situation as a “nightmare of data” that ultimately couldn’t communicate. Additionally, with over 5,000 members and multiple membership types, ASA needed a strong data management system and customer relationship management (CRM) platform. ASA believes it has found the right software fit in NetForum, with native integration with LMS. ASA chose to stay in the same Momentive family of products to scale its organization, launch its goals, and make its dreams come true.

With ASA’s previous software systems, the platforms didn’t communicate with each other. The simplest tasks, such as renewing a member, couldn’t be completed. There were significant limitations on what the systems could do compared with what ASA staff needed the platforms to do. ASA staff found the old technology very limiting, leading to a dozen spreadsheets. ASA regularly hosts webinars with 1,000+ attendees. With their limited tech stack, it was difficult to further engage and convert those non-member attendees into members. ASA staff knew they needed new technology to advance their goals, so they chose NetForum and LMS. 

With a staff of 12 and no internal IT, everyone at ASA shares responsibility for the platforms, owns the organization’s data, and uses efficient processes. ASA chose NetForum and its optimized adoption, which provided a templated implementation and out-of-the-box modules to onboard in five months. The organization wanted to stay within the same family for its native integration features for syncing data and tracking certification and credits, so ASA chose the LMS because it exceeded the organization’s LMS needs. ASA staff are excited to see where these platforms take them in the future.

After selecting NetForum and Momentive LMS, the LMS implementation had to go quickly due to an important webinar date. The implementation team met the deadline, and with the NetForum-optimized implementation, the AMS platform was up and running swiftly thereafter. While still early in the relationship, the promise of the native integration of NetForum and Momentive LMS to make it easy for ASA to hit member engagement goals, convert non-members into members through ASA webinars, and develop new pricing strategies for their products is encouraging. Thus far, ASA is incredibly pleased with the ease and user-friendliness of NetForum and Momentive LMS.

ASA’s work is framed around five priorities: Ageism & Culture, Economic Security, Innovation & Social Impact, Health & Wellbeing and Equity & Justice. ASA’s programs are designed to promote actionable change in each area individually and as they intersect.
How ASA found the right AMS and LMS solution
AMS and LMS Power Growth at ASA

item.title: Texas Statewide Network of Assessment Professionals (TSNAP): YourMembership Success Story
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: TSNAP becomes part of its members’ everyday social networking habits.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: TSNAP Grows Membership Engagement with Nimble AMS
TSNAP discarded its manual processes and grew membership engagement, weaving the association into the daily social networking habits of its members.
Texas Statewide Network of Assessment Professionals (TSNAP)
After the implementation of the AMS, we averaged one new member a day beyond our membership drive.
Prior to implementing the online community, our members had no reason to login every day. Now, they have a reason to login every day to check their feed and what’s happening in the community.
Past President, Texas Statewide Network of Assessment Professionals

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:4:"13k+";s:16:"data_description";s:17:"Logins in 60 days";}s:6:"item-1";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:2:"8%";s:16:"data_description";s:28:"Membership growth in 90 days";}s:6:"item-2";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:4:"100%";s:16:"data_description";s:42:"Volunteer-driven, with zero paid employees";}}

Being a 100 percent volunteer-driven organization, covering the entire state of Texas, efficiency and engagement are both major keys to growth. With our AMS solution, Texas Statewide Network of Assessment Professionals (TSNAP) combined its membership management software, website, and online social community into one easy-to-use platform. TSNAP discarded its manual processes and grew membership engagement, bringing the association into the daily social networking habits of its members.

TSNAP’s volunteer board worked from spreadsheets and operated a website only one person could use. They couldn’t send bulk emails, and accounting was lost in a sea of paper checks.  Each of the regions utilized disjointed solutions to connect with members.   

Before implementing an AMS, TSNAP functioned in a manual process nightmare. Thankfully, TSNAP was referred to us for our all-in-one membership and website solution to streamline operations, while increasing membership and engagement.  

We provided TSNAP an all-in-one solution for its membership portal, new integrated website, and built-in online community. Immediately, TSNAP reported an increase in volunteer staff efficiency and an improved member experience.

With Momentive's all-in-one solution and support, TSNAP successfully implemented its membership portal, new integrated website, and built-in online community. TSNAP’s priority was to rollout its website and membership portal. Immediately, TSNAP reported an increase in volunteer staff efficiency and an improved member experience. Board members easily accepted online dues and payments, updated the website with current and relevant content, and communicated with the entire membership through bulk emails.  

Fifteen months after its original implementation, TSNAP introduced SocialLink to its membership. TSNAP brought together multiple, disjointed networking tools into one AMS. With our Online Community, members connected, shared ideas and collaborated—exactly what the TSNAP board hoped for and the numbers keep growing.
Texas Statewide Network of Assessment Professionals (TSNAP) is a volunteer-driven professional organization, which supports the needs of assessment professionals in Texas.
How TSNAP replaced manual processes with Nimble AMS
TSNAP Boosts Engagement by Eliminating Manual Processes

item.title: The Professional Liability Underwriting Society (PLUS): NetForum Success Story
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: To accommodate the massive growth in PLUS membership and to facilitate more complex accounting needs, PLUS staff knew they needed a robust AMS that could help them amplify their organization and meet their goals. PLUS chose NetForum because the system was the perfect fit for the organization’s needs.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: PLUS: Finding the Right AMS with Momentive
PLUS find its Goldilocks of Association Management Systems in NetForum

With so much of what we needed included in baseline, we didn’t have to do many configurations, which saved us a lot of time and money. NetForum is our Goldilocks AMS; it fits just right.” Erin Stephens, Deputy Chief Operating Officer PLUS

We needed a seamless way for staff to do their own work instead of relying on a handoff to do one task in the system. With NetForum, our staff owns the system and can now perform tasks like running transactions, changing records, and updating people on their own because of the intuitive user experience and process flows that just make sense.

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:3:"6-8";s:16:"data_description";s:161:"Only 6-8 weeks of leveraging NetForum to enhance the member experience and optimize staff efficiencies vs. 20 years in a legacy AMS with countless customizations";}s:6:"item-1";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:2:"4+";s:16:"data_description";s:81:"Over 4 hours of staff time saved a day when staff is working on certifications. ";}s:6:"item-2";a:2:{s:10:"data_title";s:0:"";s:16:"data_description";s:108:"Automations allow staff extra time to advance their mission and not be bogged down in administrative tasks ";}}

The Professional Liability Underwriting Society (PLUS) is the only association created for the professional liability insurance industry. PLUS seeks to be a global community for the professional liability insurance industry by providing essential knowledge, thought leadership, and career development opportunities for its members.  

Recently, PLUS membership increased from 6,000 to almost 45,000. To accommodate the massive growth in PLUS membership and to address more complex accounting needs, PLUS staff knew they needed a robust AMS to help them scale their organization and meet their goals.  

PLUS chose NetForum because the system was the perfect fit for the organization’s needs. With the new AMS, PLUS staff knew they could save time and money by not needing many configurations. Ultimately, NetForum is robust and scalable for fast-growing membership, working for the association rather than against.

When using its previous AMS, PLUS staff complained that many of their tasks were manual and cumbersome. PLUS’s old system lacked the necessary capabilities, such as automation, to run its day-to-day processes efficiently. PLUS had to rely on manual operations with limited staff to complete processes.  

On PLUS’s old AMS, staff experienced a continued rise in licensing costs, which eventually made access difficult, prompting VPN logins. PLUS knew it needed to improve the user experience for both staff and members. For its next AMS, PLUS prioritized finding an AMS that would deliver a superior staff and member experience. PLUS chose NetForum to deliver on these technological priorities.

Post-implementation, PLUS immediately achieved accounting efficiencies through batch processing and automation, reducing staff workdays by a considerable amount of time. PLUS is also driving more members to its member portal, boosting member engagement, and ensuring staff can embrace more mission-empowering tasks.

PLUS staff described the implementation team as the “most impressive team the association worked with.” Momentive took time to understand PLUS’s business needs so NetForum would work for both PLUS staff and members. With their new AMS, configurations have been limited. Within just 6-8 weeks, PLUS staff have been fully utilizing NetForum capabilities, freeing them to drive engagement, add e-commerce products, segment membership, and advance the PLUS mission. Due to the intuitive, user-friendly interface, both staff and members are experiencing a massive improvement in the user experience.

The Professional Liability Underwriting Society (PLUS) is the only association created exclusively by and for the entire professional liability insurance industry. PLUS’s mission is to be the global community for the professional liability insurance industry by providing essential knowledge, thought leadership, and career development opportunities.
How PLUS found the right AMS fit with NetForum
PLUS Finds the Right-Fit AMS with Momentive
